\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3448 introduces Viscosity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \eta_{\mathrm{TZP}} = 1 - \exp\!\left( - \frac{n!}{k_{\mathrm{B}} T} \right), \]
